title: UFO Physics & Disclosure Under Trump (ft. Matthew Pines)
summary: Matthew Pines discusses the implications of Trump's election victory through the lens of 'American perestroika,' analyzing potential geopolitical shifts, monetary policy changes, and how UAP disclosure might be leveraged strategically. The conversation covers the intersection of AI, quantum technology, and UFO programs, with Pines suggesting that disclosure momentum is driven more by accountability concerns than public transparency.
